---
title: Events
---

# Posters


- **Docto Bib Day** (michelin internal meeting within the research and development perimeter), Clermont-Ferrand, France, May 2026 
- **Prairie/MIAI Artificial Intelligence Summer School (PAISS) 2025**, Grenoble, France, Sep 2025

# Talks

- **Rencontre des jeunes statisticiens** (RJS), May 2026
- **57th Journees des statistiques** (JDS) 2026, Clermont-Ferrand, France June 2026
